## Marvell Technology's AI Custom-Silicon Premium Faces Valuation Scrutiny

MRVL's custom silicon thesis is a core holding rationale; if the AI premium is seen as fully priced, the stock's risk/reward compresses even without a fundamental deterioration — a critical distinction for position sizing.

- MRVL is attracting AI-driven investor attention but valuation scrutiny is rising.
- The central debate is whether a premium to forward growth is already embedded in the share price.
- Custom ASIC and chip-design competitive positioning are the thesis anchors under review.
- No specific financial metrics cited; framing is valuation-versus-growth-rate tension.
